win_condition: The team wins if all psychics complete their suspect/location/object and then correctly identify the culprit group in the final vote.
tiebreaker: No point tiebreaker; final-vote ties are resolved by clairvoyancy order (then eldest player) per rules.

categories.label: All Psychics Complete Reconstruction
categories.description: All psychics must complete character, location, and object before the end of hour VII.

categories.label: Culprit Group Correctly Identified
categories.description: Final team vote must match the ghost-selected culprit group.
